scope.dependency_radius: Root and .dev entry docs only; do not rewrite guides or standards in this task.
constraints: Every advertised active path must exist or be clearly labeled future/template/deferred.
Do not create empty directories only to satisfy stale index text unless the directory has an active contract.
Apply the README/INDEX responsibility rule: README explains folder purpose; INDEX owns catalogs and per-path descriptions.
non_goals: Do not normalize .ai language in this task.
Do not rewrite specs or operations guide content beyond entry references.

review_findings: .dev/README.MD advertises lessons/ but the directory is absent.
.dev/INDEX.md points to absent requirement, lessons, and legacy paths.
user_constraints: Arrange remediation tasks before broad fixes.

steps: Classify each missing path as remove, relabel as template/future, or replace with current active path.
Update entry docs with minimal wording changes.
Run targeted reference search for removed paths.

results.summary: Removed stale active entry references from .dev README/INDEX and moved active directory descriptions into .dev/INDEX.md.
tests_run: active-surface referenced-path existence scan excluding archival workflow records and retired requirements
rg -n -uu "[一-龥]" over remediated .ai entry docs
targeted stale entry reference scans for removed .dev index paths
targeted README catalog scans for remediated high-level README files
